question: Are structural survey reports and UTM records filed in the ESP documentation as per procedure?
Are all coating repairs and hot work records updated in the coating technical file (Part IV)?
Were coating reinstatement records after ballast tank repairs properly documented?
Are any explosion-proof light fittings damaged, cracked, or internally dirty?
Have all defective or deteriorated light fittings been recorded in JiBe?

Are six-monthly SEEMP review records properly filed and updated in the review log?
Is the Statement of Compliance for Fuel Oil Consumption available onboard?

Is VDR fully operational? If not, is defect recorded and tracked with valid dispensation?
Is BWTS fully operational? If not, is CoC issued and corrective action tracked?
Is ODME operational? If not, is repair tracked within due date?
Is cargo tank level gauging system operational for all tanks? If not, is mitigation and repair plan documented?
Are any statutory or class certificates issued on short-term basis? If yes, are actions in place before expiry?
Are all Conditions of Class (CoC) tracked with defined corrective action and due dates?
Is any navigation equipment (RPM indicator, compass, etc.) defective? If yes, is it recorded in JiBe?
Are all defects entered in JiBe acknowledged by shore management?
